description: Allowlist of packages permitted to run lifecycle scripts during npm install.

packages.name: better-sqlite3
packages.reason: Native SQLite binding — requires node-gyp rebuild to compile C++ addon

packages.name: fsevents
packages.reason: Native macOS filesystem watcher — optional dependency of chokidar; requires prebuild for native binary

packages.name: node-pty
packages.reason: Pseudoterminal native addon — postinstall script compiles TypeScript and links native library

packages.name: protobufjs
packages.reason: Protocol Buffers runtime — postinstall generates stub types and validates installation

packages.name: sharp
packages.reason: High-performance image processing — install script downloads libvips and compiles native binding

packages.name: tree-sitter
packages.reason: Incremental parsing library — install script compiles native C parser via node-gyp-build

packages.name: tree-sitter-javascript
packages.reason: Tree-sitter JavaScript grammar — install compiles native parser binding

packages.name: tree-sitter-typescript
packages.reason: Tree-sitter TypeScript grammar — install compiles native parser binding
